label: April 21 — Over the Top mortar clear
description: Canonical April 21 challenge-clear line. Opens with a corner-safe Sunroot Bloom at (0, 0), builds a wall-side Thorn Vine ring in col 0 across all five lanes by ~t=22s, then triples the siege lane 2 with thornVine(2,1) + amberWall(2,2) so the wave-2 and wave-3 Glass Rams see 3 combat defenders before contact. Lane 1 is re-tripled with thornVine(1,1) + amberWall(1,2) before wave 4's lane-1 Glass Ram at t=78s. Cottonburr Mortar is placed at (1, 3) at 01:12 (t=72000) so its arc picks off the rearmost trailers in lane 1. coordinateBase stays 0 because the runtime replay harness consumes internal board coordinates.
